name: Vite + React + Tailwind CSS
description: Creates a new React project using Vite and fully configures Tailwind CSS.

commands.description: Scaffold the Vite + React project with TypeScript.

commands.command: cd {{projectName}} && npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
commands.description: Install Tailwind CSS and its peer dependencies.
Add the Tailwind directives to your CSS.
Verify the project builds successfully with Tailwind included.
